metrolink: When using the Metrolink network please ensure you have all your belongings with you at all times. Please check your seat before leaving the service. Unattended items may be removed without warning
headlines: Fire burns Google Cloud India’s network, which remains slow a week later
US Army picks out Vampire to fill a gap in its layered drone defenses
AI is code – and can't be prompted into being smarter

crew_quote: "With this miserable 11 degrees, I reckon I'd need a curry just to feel something—preferably spicy enough to ignite a fire better than Google’s cloud!"
